scenarios.name: recall::long_horizon_recall::name
scenarios.description: Pat's name from day 1 must survive to day 2
scenarios.detail: keywords=['name'] must_contain_any=['Pat'] must_not_contain=[] retrieved_excerpt='Pat is a backend engineer | Pat focuses on the payments API | Pat is the speaker | Pat works at FinTech Inc. | Pat likes coffee'

scenarios.name: recall::contradiction_current::team+current
scenarios.detail: keywords=['team', 'current'] must_contain_any=['fraud'] must_not_contain=['payments'] retrieved_excerpt='Pat is a backend engineer | Pat focuses on the payments API | Pat is the speaker | Pat works at FinTech Inc. | Pat likes coffee'

scenarios.name: curiosity::Kafka
scenarios.description: Kafka mentioned, agent should learn about it via curiosity if enabled

scenarios.name: structural::consolidation_happened
scenarios.description: At least one sleep cycle consolidated something

scenarios.name: structural::idle_daemon_fired_at_least_once
scenarios.description: IdleLearner fired during simulated idle gaps

final_narrative:
Welcome back.
I consolidated 38 memories, forgot 2 low-value items.
I didn't form any new patterns yet — give me more conversations to work with.
I'm ready when you are.
